Thanks for contributing to Roost! A few quick reminders:

* Conventional Commit prefix in the title: feat / fix / docs / chore / refactor / test
* Tests are required unless the change is genuinely untestable
* Update CHANGELOG.md under "## [Unreleased]"
* If you change the schema, note whether `roost-web` needs a sibling change
-->
